sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls an attack helicopter moving through constantly scrolling vertical levels. Movement mechanics not explicitly documented.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Standard shot with max distance of screen height; three-bomb capacity with switchable weapon types (red, blue, green, yellow). Bombs have blast radius for area damage.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No detailed movement physics documentation available. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and development history but lacks specific velocity, acceleration, or sub-pixel precision data. Game is a vertical scrolling shooter (shmup) where precise platforming physics are not primary design focus.
